text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
GREETINGS! I'm Bamboo Memory, and I am here
to RACE MY HEART OUT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're as energetic as ever, I see. Your training
has clearly paid off.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Look who's talking, Yaeno! You look great!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have you to thank for that. I've been looking
forward to running with you today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall do everything in my power to defeat
you—to express my gratitude for reigniting the
fierce blaze in my heart...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And for being both a dear rival and one of my
treasured adversaries.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
OHHHHH YEEEAH!
That was an incredible challenge, Yaeno! You're
on fire!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um, I feel the same, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You believed in me and my dream to catch up to
the person I admire! And today, I'll show you just
how strong that dream is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're one of my precious rivals as well!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
NOT YOU TOOOO! I don't think my heart can
take all this HAPPINESS!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This's what I'm talkin' about! Your energy 'n'
excitement's infectin' everyone! It's like a real
festival 'round here now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Inari!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Inari's been getting a lot of attention for her own
relentless pursuit of Oguri. She's like an
old-school Edo fighter—she really packs a punch!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You and Oguri sure put on a show back at the
Yasuda Kinen, but are you gonna be all right
today?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is 2,200 meters. It's a totally
different story from the Yasuda Kinen. You're not
worried?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Sure. This distance isn't exactly my strong suit.
But even so...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna use that as an excuse to back
down! No way!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm burning hot as the sun right now! And I'll use
this heat to give you the race of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha! Hell yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
After all that talk, it's time to put our money
where our mouths are. See ya on the track.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We're going to head over too. Let's make this an
unforgettable race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to let you beat me, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll see you both out there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oooooh! Oh MAN! I can't stop shaking!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Still? You've been like this since yesterday. Get a
grip already.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: City!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Gold City is not only a serious racer—she's also a
very successful model. She never holds back,
whether on the runway or the racetrack!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(She also happens to be my roommate! We've
been together for a long time now!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I get that you're excited, but this race is
incredibly important to me too, so could you not
pretend I don't exist?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?! There's no way I would do that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm just as excited that I get to run against you as
I am anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But don't expect me to comfort you today just
'cause you're my roommate! I'll be too busy
celebrating!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Have you literally ever seen me cry? Plus, it's not
like you've ever had to comforted me before!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Two can play at that game—When you lose, don't think I'll let you turn our room into your own personal training dojo!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not like that'll happen anyway. I'm turning this
course into my own personal catwalk.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Not on my watch! Come at me with everything
you got!
